script: STAGE_ID=preset_vision STAGE_NAME='Preset Vision Photo' STAGE_GOAL='Classify preset object photos locally with Apple Vision before unlocking the alarm' STAGE_REQUIRED_CAPABILITIES=preset_object_picker,local_vision_classification,photo_dismiss_blocking,vision_eval_coverage STAGE_ROOT=.workflow/object-proof-program/stages/preset_vision node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/object-proof-stage-implementation.md --stage object-proof-preset-vision-implementation --eval-id iphone-object-proof.preset-vision.implementation.call --out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.prompt.md --last-message-out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.last-message.md
command:
exec 2>&1
STAGE_ID=preset_vision STAGE_NAME='Preset Vision Photo' STAGE_GOAL='Classify preset object photos locally with Apple Vision before unlocking the alarm' STAGE_REQUIRED_CAPABILITIES=preset_object_picker,local_vision_classification,photo_dismiss_blocking,vision_eval_coverage STAGE_ROOT=.workflow/object-proof-program/stages/preset_vision node scripts/iphone-app-factory/run-codex-prompt.mjs --prompt prompts/iphone-app-factory/object-proof-stage-implementation.md --stage object-proof-preset-vision-implementation --eval-id iphone-object-proof.preset-vision.implementation.call --out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.json --rendered-prompt-out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.prompt.md --last-message-out .workflow/object-proof-program/codex/preset-vision-implementation.last-message.md
